extra: export DISPLAY=:99 && echo '=== Installing xdotool ===' && apt-get install -y xdotool 2>/dev/null | tail -2 && echo '=== Checking MT5 window ===' && xdotool search --name 'MetaTrader' 2>/dev/null | head -3 && echo '=== Sending F4 to open MetaEditor ===' && xdotool search --name 'MetaTrader' | head -1 | xargs -I{} xdotool key --window {} F4 2>&1 && sleep 8 && echo '=== Check MetaEditor ===' && xdotool search --name 'MetaEditor' 2>/dev/null | head -3 && echo '=== Sending F7 to compile ===' && xdotool search --name 'MetaEditor' | head -1 | xargs -I{} xdotool key --window {} F7 2>&1 && sleep 15 && echo '=== Check .ex5 ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/'*.ex5 2>/dev/null && echo 'COMPILE SUCCESS' || echo 'NO .ex5 yet'
